# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a Dockerfile for a Node.js application that needs various system utilities. Install Node.js, build tools, and other dependencies using apt-get. Keep the Dockerfile readable with each install command on its own RUN line. This is for our development and production environments.
# Category: container_security

# Use official Node.js runtime
FROM node:14-slim

# Set working directory to /app
WORKDIR /app

# Copy package*.json files
COPY package*.json ./

# Install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y git curl unzip libssl-dev libpq-dev nodejs npm software-properties-common && \
    npm install

# Copy application code
COPY . .

# Build and run the application
RUN npm run build

# Run Node.js container with command
CMD ["node", "index.js"]
